root_text.sn55.62:1.1: “Cattārome, bhikkhave, dhammā bhāvitā bahulīkatā mahāpaññatāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.sn55.62:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, cattāro dhammā bhāvitā bahulīkatā mahāpaññatāya saṁvattantī”ti.

translation_text.sn55.62:1.1: “Mendicants, when four things are developed and cultivated they lead to great wisdom.
translation_text.sn55.62:1.3: Associating with true persons, listening to the true teaching, rational application of mind, and practicing in line with the teaching.
translation_text.sn55.62:1.4: When these four things are developed and cultivated they lead to great wisdom.”
